chunks.title: Judges Tola and Jair
chunks.reason: Narrative summary of two judges' reigns and deaths.

chunks.title: Israel's Apostasy and Oppression
chunks.reason: Description of Israel's sin and subsequent military defeat by Philistines and Ammonites.

chunks.title: Israel's Repentance and Yahweh's Rebuke
chunks.reason: Exchange of dialogue between Israel and Yahweh regarding their sin and deliverance.

chunks.title: Mobilization in Gilead
chunks.reason: Narrative of armies gathering and the princes seeking a leader.
